prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年约1529名→2022年约2335名→2023年约2393名→2024年约2684名→2025年约4096名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2567名；2025年较2024年后移1412名，为近年最大降幅，基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市2021-2024年招生计划均为10人，2025年增至11人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划15人，较2025年扩招约36.4%，扩招幅度较大，理论上会缓解竞争压力、推高位次数字。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021-2026年连续位列第7名，属全国顶尖高校（C9联盟成员），对高分考生吸引力极强；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，主要因李政道先生逝世引发对其为中科大少年班创立贡献的回顾，提升了学校形象；2026年周期出现偏负面事件（教授贪污助学生入读硕士课程被判囚），但整体关注度仍高。抖音综合热度排名第12（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科8个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科3个（材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理），A-学科8个，A类及以上学科共19个，学科实力极为突出，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非上海本地高校；该校在上海市招生占比极小（2025年约11人，占全国总计划比例极低），上海考生跨省报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约36.4%对竞争压力的缓解作用、以及上海考生总数同比增加约35.4%对竞争的加剧作用，两者基本相互抵消；学校顶尖层次和抖音高热关注度维持较强吸引力。在2025年基准位次4096名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约4990名，区间4490–5490名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、自动化、人工智能等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（含物理学、应用物理学、光电信息科学与工程、天文学）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（含化学类、生物科学类、空间科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料）（含化学、材料物理、材料化学等）
- 理科试验班类（量子未来技术试点班）（量子信息科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4990名，区间4490-5490名。位次在区间下限（4490名以内）可重点冲刺一档的计算机类、电子信息类、数学类等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约4990名）建议以二档为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限附近（5490名左右）建议以二档为主、三档保底。中科大所有专业均为顶尖水平，各档之间差距极小，考生可根据个人兴趣和学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 1529th in 2021 → approximately 2335th in 2022 → approximately 2393rd in 2023 → approximately 2684th in 2024 → approximately 4096th in 2025, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2567 places in the past 4 years; in 2025, it shifted backward by 1412 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in recent years, with a baseline ranking of about 4096th; the university's enrollment plan in Shanghai was 10 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 11 in 2025; in 2026 (enrollment plan document), it plans to enroll 15 students, an increase of about 36.4% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which theoretically will ease competition pressure and push the ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 7th consecutively in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top national universities (C9 League member), with strong appeal to high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle is relatively positive, mainly due to the passing of Mr. Li Zhengdao, which triggered a review of his contribution to the establishment of USTC's Special Class for the Gifted Young, enhancing the university's image; in the 2026 cycle, a relatively negative event occurred (a professor was imprisoned for embezzlement to help students enroll in master's programs), but overall attention remains high. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 12th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 3 A disciplines (Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration), 8 A- disciplines, and a total of 19 disciplines at A level or above, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength, highly correlated with the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended; the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Shanghai; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is extremely small (about 11 students in 2025, accounting for a very low proportion of the national total plan), and Shanghai candidates' willingness to apply across provinces is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the easing effect of the significant enrollment expansion of about 36.4% in 2026 on competition pressure, and the intensifying effect of a year-on-year increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates on competition, the two basically offset each other; the university's top-tier level and high Douyin popularity maintain strong appeal. Based on the baseline ranking of 4096th in 2025, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 4990th, with a range of 4490–5490.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (including Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Astronomy)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) (including Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Space Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials) (including Chemistry, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class) (Quantum Information Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 4990th, range 4490-5490. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit of the range (within 4490th) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Mathematics; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 4990th) are advised to focus on Tier 2 while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 5490th) are advised to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety option. All majors at USTC are at the top level, with minimal differences between tiers; candidates can choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation grades.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
